metadata.description: Official conduitAI plugin marketplace — search, browse, and install MCP servers, agents, skills, and prompts from the conduitAI catalog directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: conduitai
plugins.description: Search, browse, and install MCP servers, agents, skills, prompts, and plugins from the conduitAI catalog. Sign in once with /mcp to pull content tied to your conduitAI account.
